prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically pertains to Unity Housing Association Limited, which operates within Yorkshire and Humberside in England. The regulatory framework described, including the Governance and Financial Viability Standard, applies only to registered providers of social housing in England and does not extend to Scotland.
